# Skill Downloads

把 GitHub 仓库链接发给你的 agent，并说“安装 multi-agent skill”。agent 应先阅读
`docs/agent-install.md`，再按客户端选择对应安装包。

## v0.1.3

| Package | 用途 | Size | SHA256 |
| --- | --- | ---: | --- |
| [codex-multi-agent-skill-v0.1.3.zip](codex-multi-agent-skill-v0.1.3.zip) | Codex 专用 skill，优先支持 Desktop 原生 subagent；handoff 与 Codex CLI 是兜底 | 96039 | `d043674cc5ab8b189776226cfb3a6491247da77f707ac966fa19a5acb64e1c31` |

| [claude-code-multi-agent-pack-v0.1.3.zip](claude-code-multi-agent-pack-v0.1.3.zip) | Claude Code 专用 pack，包含 `CLAUDE.md` 与 launcher 依赖 | 87769 | `a2405c3fec425a6bbedba250e58df49a92a0ed00e92d3aa482e28284ce219541` |
| [openclaw-multi-agent-skill-v0.1.3.zip](openclaw-multi-agent-skill-v0.1.3.zip) | OpenClaw/Her 专用 skill，包含 mission-control scripts | 61990 | `90623a8b9d95a135b4696685212180abd9765ab685e9a921a7e601b7c8462aa3` |
| [multi-agent-coding-skill-v0.1.3.zip](multi-agent-coding-skill-v0.1.3.zip) | 通用协议包，只包含 skill 规则、模板和清单 | 34012 | `1535ac719668b622f310648948cee0d7ab2c86e10e29275f22c4ae6e8cd048dc` |
